all_steps_failed: Profile apply failed — no settings were applied successfully
apply_in_progress: Another profile is being applied — try again in a moment
at_error: Modem returned an error for this command
blocked: This command is blocked from direct execution
cannot_remove_bundled: Bundled language packs cannot be removed
checksum_mismatch: File checksum does not match — download may be corrupt
collect_fragment_invalid: Backup contains an invalid configuration fragment
egmr_failed: Failed to write IMEI to modem
install_in_progress: Another install is already in progress
invalid_band_type: Invalid band type — must be LTE or 5G
invalid_bands: One or more band values are invalid
invalid_distance_unit: Invalid distance unit — must be km or miles
invalid_enabled: Enabled field must be true or false
invalid_json: Request body is not valid JSON
invalid_pdp_type: Invalid PDP type (must be IP, IPV6, or IPV4V6)
invalid_repeats: DPI desync repeats must be a whole number between 1 and 10.
invalid_temp_unit: Invalid temperature unit — must be C or F
invalid_threshold: Threshold value is out of valid range
ip_passthrough_locked_by_verizon_profile: IP Passthrough is managed by the active Verizon profile — deactivate it to change these settings
method_not_allowed: HTTP method not allowed — use GET or POST
missing_fields: One or more required fields are missing
missing_indexes: Indexes field is required for delete operation
missing_target_mac: Target MAC address field is required
modem_busy: Modem is busy with another operation — try again in a moment
mpdn_rule_revert_failed: Failed to restore default data routing — a reboot is recommended
no_init_script: Service init script not found — service may not be installed
no_lock_targets: No tower frequency targets available for locking
other_vpn_installed: Another VPN service is already installed
partial_apply: Profile applied with some steps failing — check the apply progress for details
partial_failure: Some items succeeded but others failed
password_weak: Password is too weak — must be at least 5 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number
rate_limited: Too many failed attempts — please try again later
service_running: Service is currently running — stop it first
setup_required: Initial setup required — set a password first
sim_mismatch: Active SIM does not match the profile's expected SIM
speedtest_failed: Speedtest did not produce a result
still_enabled: Service must be disabled before uninstalling
tower_lock_active: Tower lock is currently active — disable it first
updater_invalid_target: Update target is invalid or missing
usb_mode_incompatible_for_verizon: Verizon profiles require USB mode ECM or RNDIS — change USB mode in IP Passthrough settings before activating
wol_not_supported: Wake-on-LAN control is not supported on this hardware
write_failed: Failed to write configuration to storage
wrong_schema: Backup schema version does not match the current version
